defaultSeo.metaDescription: Scale your business with AI-powered SEO and automation. Lead generation and workflow bots.

global.siteDescription: Scale your business with AI-powered SEO and automation

hero.subtitle: We specialize in lead generation and building complex bots to automate your most challenging workflows. Dominate your niche while our AI handles the heavy lifting.

labels.noContent: Add content in your Strapi admin.
labels.contactPlaceholder: Get in touch for a free audit. Add content in your Strapi admin.
labels.termsPlaceholder: Add your terms of service in Strapi Admin.
labels.privacyPlaceholder: Add your privacy policy in Strapi Admin.

features.title: AI-Powered Outbound Lead Generation
features.description: Our AI identifies and qualifies high-intent prospects across the web, turning cold outreach into warm conversations.

features.title: Personalized Multi-Channel Outreach
features.description: AI-written custom copy that resonates. Reach prospects through email, LinkedIn, and more with smart follow-up sequences.

features.title: Complex Bot Automations & Integration
features.description: Connect your tools and let our bots handle repetitive tasks. Real-time sync, automated booking, 24/7 monitoring.

features.title: Data-Driven Sales Intelligence
features.description: Real-time insights into your pipeline. Profile ideal customers, track intent signals, score and qualify leads.

how-it-works.title: How It Works
how-it-works.subtitle: Our proven 4-step system that generates predictable leads every month

steps.title: Identify Your Ideal Prospects
steps.description: We analyze your business and create detailed buyer personas, then use AI to find companies that match your ideal customer profile.

steps.title: Craft Personalized Outreach
steps.description: Our AI system creates highly personalized messages that resonate with each prospect, increasing response rates by 300%.

steps.title: Multi-Channel Engagement
steps.description: We reach prospects through email, LinkedIn, and other channels with perfectly timed sequences that feel human, not robotic.

steps.title: Convert & Optimize
steps.description: We handle objections, book qualified meetings, and continuously optimize campaigns based on real performance data.

why-choose.title: Why Choose AISEEN Over Traditional Methods?
why-choose.subtitle: Compare our AI-powered approach to ads, referrals, and cold calling

testimonials.title: Real Results from Real Clients
testimonials.subtitle: See how our clients are scaling their businesses with predictable lead generation

items.quote: Aiseen completely transformed our lead generation. We went from inconsistent results to 25+ qualified leads every month. The ROI is incredible—we're closing more deals than ever before.
items.author: John Davis

items.quote: The AI-powered outreach feels human and personalized. Our response rates tripled within the first 60 days. Highly recommend for any B2B company looking to scale.
items.author: Sarah Chen

items.quote: We tried ads, cold calling, everything. Aiseen's system is the first that delivered predictable results. 15-25 leads every month, guaranteed.
items.author: Michael Roberts

use-cases.title: AI Use Cases: How We Helped Agencies Automate, Scale, and Grow
use-cases.subtitle: Real results from real clients. See how our AI-powered systems transformed businesses across industries.

cases.title: Marketing By Prof: Manual Outreach Transformed
cases.result: 30% increase in new clients within just 90 days
cases.challenge: Manual prospecting consumed countless hours with limited results.
cases.solution: Implemented AI-powered sequencing using Apollo and Instantly.

results.text: 30% increase in new clients within just 90 days

cases.title: LeenWeb: Scaling Cold Outreach Fast
cases.result: 70+ Qualified Meetings booked within first 2 months

results.text: 70+ Qualified Meetings booked within first 2 months
2X Response Rate vs previous manual outreach

cases.title: Entice MM: Eliminating Manual Instagram Engagement

results.text: Automated IG bot handling replies and follow-ups

cases.title: Marketing Agency (NDA): Upwork Proposal Automation
cases.challenge: Agency relied solely on Upwork but wasted hours writing manual proposals

use-cases.ctaPrompt: Ready to see results like these for your business?

pricing.title: Choose Your Growth Path
pricing.subtitle: Whether you want us to handle everything or guide you through the process

guarantee.title: 100% Risk-Free Guarantee
guarantee.subtitle: Full Refund if We Don't Hit Target
guarantee.body: We're so confident in our system that we guarantee 15-25 qualified leads per month. If we don't deliver on our promise within the first 90 days, you get a full refund. No questions asked.
guarantee.footnote: * Qualified leads are defined as prospects who match your ideal customer profile and have expressed genuine interest in your service.

final-cta.title: Ready to Scale Your Lead Generation?
final-cta.body: Book a free 30-minute consultation to see how we can generate 15-25 qualified leads for your business every month.
final-cta.subtext: 30-minute call · Free consultation · No strings attached

bullets.text: Create a custom lead generation strategy
Show you exactly how we'll get 15-25 leads/month

final-cta.footerNote: No strings attached. Even if we're not a fit, you'll leave with valuable insights about scaling your lead generation.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch for a free audit or to learn how we can help scale your lead generation.
contact.body: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you're ready to book a free consultation or just have questions, reach out anytime.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body:
Welcome to AISEEN. By using our services, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.

## Use of Services

Our lead generation and automation services are provided for business use. You agree to use them in compliance with applicable laws.

## Contact

For questions about these terms, contact us at hello@aiseen.com.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.body:
AISEEN respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

## Information We Collect

We collect information you provide when contacting us or using our services, including name, email, and company details.

## How We Use It

We use your information to deliver our services, communicate with you, and improve our offerings.

## Contact

For privacy questions, email hello@aiseen.com.
